## Implementation Notes

### Splash Screen Implementation
- WPF splash screen with centered logo image
- Version number displayed prominently below logo
- Auto-closes after 3 seconds
- Can be manually closed by clicking anywhere on the window
- Shows during application startup before main window
- Dark theme with rounded corners (#1a1a1a background)
- Version retrieved dynamically from assembly attributes

### Splash Screen Features
- **Image**: ubiquitus-splash_512x512.png (400x400 display size)
- **Version Display**: Retrieved from AssemblyVersion (0.0.1)
- **Loading Indicator**: "Loading..." text at bottom
- **Auto-Close Timer**: 3 seconds
- **Manual Close**: Click anywhere on window
- **Window Properties**:
  - Borderless (WindowStyle="None")
  - Transparent background allowed
  - Centered on screen
  - Topmost window
  - Not resizable

### Files Created/Modified
- [x] AppData/PromptLog/12-19-2025_17-50.md (this file)
- [x] SplashWindow.xaml
- [x] SplashWindow.xaml.cs
- [x] App.xaml.cs (modified to show splash)
- [x] App.xaml (removed StartupUri for programmatic startup)
- [x] AppData/PromptLog/index.md

### Code Changes Summary

#### SplashWindow.xaml
- Created WPF window with dark theme
- Included logo image with proper sizing
- Added version text display (dynamically populated)
- Added loading indicator
- Configured window properties for splash screen behavior

#### SplashWindow.xaml.cs
- Implemented SplashWindow class with full XML documentation
- Added version number retrieval from assembly
- Implemented DispatcherTimer for 3-second auto-close
- Added mouse click handler for manual close
- Proper timer cleanup on close

#### App.xaml.cs
- Overrode OnStartup method
- Implemented splash screen display logic
- Configured splash-to-main-window transition
- Main window shows after splash closes

#### App.xaml
- Removed StartupUri attribute
- Application startup now handled programmatically
